title: genista supranubia
intro: Genista supranubia, also known as the Spurred Genista or Spurred Vetch, is a perennial legume native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, as well as the ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. The health benefits of Genista supranubia include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Genista supranubia is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or in the form of a tincture or extract, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
